short_description: A multi-agent AI system for collaborative blog post drafting
domain_summary: {'topic': 'Content Creation', 'subtopics': ['Blog Post Drafting', 'Collaboration', 'AI-assisted Writing'], 'key_terms': ['natural language processing', 'multi-agent systems', 'content creation']}
architecture_notes: Use a microservices architecture for scalability and maintainability
Implement a knowledge graph for storing and retrieving domain-specific knowledge
Use a message broker for agent communication
backend_modules: Content Generator: Uses NLP and machine learning to generate initial blog post drafts
Editor: Reviews and edits generated drafts for grammar, syntax, and clarity
Reviewer: Provides feedback on content, structure, and engagement
frontend_features: Dashboard: Provides a user interface for interacting with the system
Editor: Allows users to review and edit generated drafts
data_sources: Knowledge Graph: Stores and retrieves domain-specific knowledge
User Feedback: Stores user feedback and ratings
testing_strategy: Unit testing for individual agents and modules
Integration testing for agent communication and knowledge graph interactions
System testing for end-to-end functionality and user experience
starter_questions: What is the topic of the blog post?
What are the keywords and tone for the blog post?
What is the desired length and format of the blog post?
workflow_steps: Content Generation: Generate initial blog post drafts using the Content Generator agent
Editing: Review and edit generated drafts using the Editor agent
Review: Provide feedback on content, structure, and engagement using the Reviewer agent
business_rules: Content must be relevant and engaging
Content must be well-structured and easy to read
Content must be free of grammatical and syntax errors

sample_documents.content: This is a sample blog post draft generated by the Content Generator agent.
This is a sample edited draft generated by the Editor agent.
This is a sample review feedback generated by the Reviewer agent.
